---
title: "PSU R Workshop"
author: "Grayson Isbell"
date: 2026-03-18
format: html
editor: visual
---

Anything outside of the R box won't run as code, and I don't have to put # to comment out of it 
```{r}

typeof("a")
# typeof() is a function. It has something to do with decimal points. Not sure if that will be relavant for me. 

```

```{r}
print("Wednesday")
```
